careers@motivitylabs.com.subject: Internship Inquiry: Fullstack Development - Preston Rank
careers@motivitylabs.com.body:
Hi Motivity Labs Team,

My name is Preston Rank, a Computer Science Junior at the University of Texas at Dallas, graduating Dec 2027. I'm incredibly impressed by Motivity Labs' approach to 'Innovation as a Service,' especially your focus on cloud-native architectures and full-lifecycle product engineering.

I'm reaching out about potential internship opportunities. My Fullstack development experience, which includes building and deploying robust applications, strongly aligns with your work. I'm keen to apply my skills and learn from your team in a real-world setting, particularly given your strong presence in Irving.

My resume is attached for your review. I'm eager to discuss how I can contribute.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,

Preston Rank
University of Texas at Dallas
